meta.purpose: Reasoning chains for code review judgment.
meta.load_condition: Load when rationale or principles are requested.

reasoning_chains.one_sentence: Behavior-first review starts from what the code does, not how it looks
reasoning_chains.so_what: If you review style before behavior, you anchor on surface features and lose capacity to assess correctness
logic: Read the PR description first — what behavior change is intended?
Trace the behavioral path through the code
Only after behavioral assessment, consider style
